title: Futuristic Blue and Fruit-Inspired Nail Art on Hands
description: Close-up of hands with nails painted in vibrant futuristic blue shades combined with colorful fruit-inspired designs including kiwi, orange, raspberry, grape, and lemon motifs. The nails are elegantly shaped and displayed on a neutral textured surface with studio lighting highlighting the glossy finish and intricate details. The image captures a modern nail art trend with a focus on vivid colors and creative patterns.
